subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken thou unto My call from round about My Throne, which hath been established in the land of the prison through that which the hands of men have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان استمعی ندائی من حول عرشی الذی استقر فی ارض السجن بما اکتسبت ایدی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
